title: Define JWT-based off-chain session token format for verified handshakes

artifacts.description: JWT profile spec with ABNF claim definitions, signing requirements, TTL policy, and delegation chain encoding
Reference TS implementation: issueSessionToken(), verifySessionToken(), and claim type definitions
10+ test vectors covering valid tokens, expired TTL, tampered claims, delegation chain permutations, and scope commitment mismatches
Integration guide for LangChain and Vercel AI SDK middleware to extract and validate Bolyra bearer tokens

steps: Audit existing handshake output shape (humanNullifier, agentNullifier, sessionNonce, scopeCommitment) in sdk/src/ and contracts/ to confirm canonical field names and byte encodings
Define JWT header: alg ES256 (or EdDSA for Ed25519 relayer keys), typ 'bolyra+jwt'
Define JWT payload ABNF: bolyra-claims = humanNullifier / agentNullifier / sessionNonce / scopeCommitment / delegationChain / iss / sub / iat / exp / chainId / verifierContract
Specify delegationChain as an ordered JSON array of nullifier hex strings (root → leaf), empty array for non-delegated sessions
Set TTL policy: default exp = iat + 300s (5 min), max 3600s, relayer MUST reject tokens with exp - iat > 3600
Specify claim validation rules: scopeCommitment must equal Poseidon(permissions, salt) committed on-chain; chainId must match the verified contract's network
Implement issueSessionToken(handshakeResult, relayerPrivKey, opts) in sdk/src/session-token.ts using jose library
Implement verifySessionToken(token, relayerPubKey) with full claim validation and expiry check

Write 10+ test vectors: (1) valid minimal token, (2) valid with 3-hop delegation chain, (3) expired token rejection, (4) wrong alg header, (5) tampered humanNullifier, (6) scopeCommitment mismatch, (7) chainId mismatch, (8) delegationChain out of order, (9) max TTL boundary, (10) missing required claim, (11) future iat rejection
Export issueSessionToken and verifySessionToken from sdk/src/index.ts public API surface
Write integration guide showing Express middleware pattern and LangChain/Vercel AI bearer token extraction
Add spec to spec/ index and link from sdk/QUICKSTART.md
dependencies: jose npm package (^5.x) for JWT sign/verify
Bolyra handshake output types from sdk/src/types/
On-chain verifier contract address + chainId from contracts/deployments/
Poseidon hash implementation (circomlibjs) for scopeCommitment recomputation in verifier
